title: Adding a view for Docs
excerpt: Looking to have the “docs” not seperated from a board. All docs probably are associated with a board, but you should have the ability of accessing the docs for the board via a “view”. This happens in clickup currently. T…

posts.author: hillaryk (Hillary Kokajko)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking to have the “docs” not seperated from a board. All docs probably are associated with a board, but you should have the ability of accessing the docs for the board via a “view”. This happens in clickup currently. Then you can have a list of journals/docs and it doesn’t cloud your board view. This would be especially great for meeting notes etc.

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be helpful for project notes that we don’t need linked to a specific item.
